reference: HE LED THE WAY THE OTHERS ALL FOLLOWING AND TAKING OUT A SLIP OF PAPER READ FROM IT IN A DISTINCT TONE LOUD ENOUGH TO BE HEARD BY THOSE ABOUT HIM WITHOUT DISTURBING THE OTHER PASSENGERS
text: He led the way, the others all following, and taking out a slip of paper read from it in a distinct tone, loud enough to be heard by those all about him, without disturbing the other passengers.
